content:
An entire YouTube series starting with a brand new account and guide along the way.

Most of the videos are recorded streams in Discord. There are conversations with players and you can hear them ask questions or also provide advice.

**A. Pre-Story Standard Character Select**
https://youtu.be/4Qaw3qB0LYc

**1. New Account Chapter 1 - Part 1**
https://youtu.be/8K3Wcm1n6Nk

---I'll keep updating as I create more videos.

embeds.title: Best Standard at the Start - New Account Prelude
embeds.description:
Wondering what standard units you should select? 

Here are the best standards to choose to help you through the "tutorial" chapters of the game 1 -5.

#morimensgameguide #newplayer #newaccount #beginner

embeds.title: New Account Chapter 1 - Part 1
embeds.description:
Going through everything a new player experiences. Doing live streams on Discord. This will probably take some time to go through.

00:00 - Very first tutorial (probably skip)
20:20 - First menu
21:10 - First Standard Pull
34:50 - Pull currency for standard and limited
37:40 - First team
53:56 - Vor

content:
Hoy everyone, we wanted to share a very big project that was in development for many, many months, born from the hard work and perseverance of a lot of people during this time, the big **BOSS COMPENDIUM**
Is a complete list of all the Bosses and Elites intentions and mechanics, all compiled in custom made Pages for each of them, and easily found and categorized in a comprehensive sheet, in here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QYciqHJY3BilDcdvBiIT_dOqXOdqGX-4FBDj5rL6qyA/edit?gid=201451668#gid=201451668.
It has been a lot of work, but is not totally over, in the future, there is the possibility to expand them with tips and suggestion of each battle, and further refine our work, so, if you have **Feedbacks, Suggestions or Error Reports, free to share them with me**
